mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_code AS noticeCode, n.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, n.title AS title, n.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS creatorName, n.created_at AS createdAt, n.updated_at AS updatedAt, n.file_code AS fileCode FROM notices n JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = n.project_code LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = n.user_code /* 로그인 사용자가 속한 프로젝트만 */ JOIN vw_user_auth a ON a.project_code = n.project_code AND a.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND a.status = 'OD1' WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY n.notice_code DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(n.notice_code), 0) + 1 FROM notices n
INSERT INTO notices
notice_code, project_code, title, content, user_code, created_at, updated_at, file_code,
#{noticeCode}, #{projectCode}, #{title}, #{content}, #{userCode}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{fileCode},
mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_code AS noticeCode, n.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, n.title AS title, n.content AS content, n.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS creatorName, n.created_at AS createdAt, n.updated_at AS updatedAt, n.file_code AS fileCode,
d.original_name AS originalName, d.uploaded_at AS uploadedAt, d.path AS filePath FROM notices n JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = n.project_code LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_code = n.user_code
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.file_code, ad.original_name, ad.path, a.uploaded_at FROM attachments a JOIN attachments_detail ad ON ad.file_code = a.file_code AND ad.is_used = 1 ) d ON d.file_code = n.file_code
JOIN vw_user_auth a2 ON a2.project_code = n.project_code AND a2.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND a2.status = 'OD1' WHERE n.notice_code = #{noticeCode}
mapper.update:
UPDATE notices
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP,
file_code = NULL,
file_code = #{fileCode},
WHERE notice_code = #{noticeCode}
mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_code AS noticeCode, n.project_code AS projectCode, n.user_code AS userCode, n.title AS title, n.content AS content, n.created_at AS createdAt, n.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM notices n WHERE n.notice_code = #{noticeCode}
